name: Magnificent Century RPG
description: Inspired by the Magnificent Century and Magnificent Century Kosem TV show. This is a full view of the dramatic life within the Ottoman Empire, you can be a member of the Sultan's council and navigate the maze of politics in hopes of glory and favour, or be a slave concubine in his harem where you will either live life as a servant to the Sultanas and the favorite concubines or become a favorite of the Sultan or one of his princes yourself and bear a son.
creator: Astronaris
